legend.label: Molecule available using a model-specific database
Not able to find a synthetic path

max_steps.label: MSSR
max_steps.description: Maximum number of single step reaction per retrosynthetic pathway

fap.label: FAP
fap.description: Acceptance value for a possible retrosynthetic step, evaluated with the forward reaction model

pruning_steps.label: SbP
pruning_steps.description: Number of steps between removal of low-probability sequences.

availability_pricing_threshold.label: USD per g/mL
availability_pricing_threshold.description: Price threshold for molecules (USD per g/mL). Everything above the threshold is considered unavailable. A threshold of 0 or 1000+ applies no filter.
